pages.title: Other Tips
pages.text: $(br)Some of the information that may be of interest is listed here

$(2)$(l)*/$ Hold Shift and click on the purse to store all coins from your inventory. Except for the money bag, which still needs to be held and right-clicked to store them manually.$(br2)$(2)$(l)*/$ Holding Shift during villager trading will automatically prepare the items for the next trade (same as pressing space).$(br2)$(2)$(l)*/$ Hovering over trades with the mouse lets you see the times traded and the allowed trade count.

$(li)Click on the recipe book, EMI will switch to craftable items. In this case, Left Click items works the same as recipe book: place the recipe onto the crafting grid, Shift+Left Click to place all. Press A to favorite items to the left.$(br)$(li)Carrying more than 3 backpacks will cause slowness.$(br)$(li)Backpacks can be worn in the back slot, so it doesn't block chestplate wearing.

$(li)Prevent placing the last torch: Client Tweaks mod settings → Tweaks → Do Not Use Last Torch$(br)$(li)When a backpack has Stack Upgrade installed and the stack size has exceeded the vanilla limit, it is recommended to still use "Shift+Left Click" to transfer items, rather than "Ctrl+Left Click".

$(li)If you are more accustomed to using buttons and less comfortable with the key of item transfers, click Inventory Profiles Next settings in the upper left corner of any inventory interface → Gui settings, and enable the buttons you need.
